vin.description: 17-character VIN; letters I, O, Q excluded.

buyer_ref.description: Opaque agent-side reference. MUST NOT contain PII.

quoted_price.description: Always equal to the merchant's listed asking_price at quote creation time. No negotiation.

out_the_door.description: OPTIONAL best-effort, non-binding out-the-door estimate derived from `quoted_price` plus the merchant's published fee schedule (tax + doc + title + registration). Present only when the merchant has pricing disclosure enabled and a live fee schedule; omitted otherwise. Never a commitment — see `ai.dmc12.automotive.pricing_disclosure` for the itemized breakdown.

out_the_door_estimate.description: Present (and always `true`) iff `out_the_door` is present. Flags the OTD figure as a non-binding estimate, not a firm price.

output.terms: Price valid for 30 minutes. No negotiation. See dealer for out-the-door pricing.
